system.description:
Volus are small humanoids native to the planet Irune, which possesses a high-pressure greenhouse atmosphere and supports a ammonia-based biochemistry. This is vastly different from the other ancestries which are primarily carbon-oxygen based. As a result, the volus must wear strong pressure suits and breathers when dealing with other species.

> Because they are not physically adept compared to most species, volus mostly make their influence felt through trade and commerce, and they have a long history on the Citadel. However, they have never been invited to join the Council, which is a sore point for many volus individuals.

- Shell: You have a bonus to your damage thresholds equal to your proficiency. - Pressurized: Once per rest, you can release high-pressure ammonia from your suit to create a temporary toxic cloud in Very Close range that obscures vision.
